body.text: Texas felt different the moment I crossed the state line.
The energy shifted and I knew I made the right decision. For me. For my kid.
I got into fitness and started living at the gym.
I got in the best shape of my life. And met lots of new friends.
Those friends helped me clear the wreckage and start to rebuild.
I immersed myself into personal development — 80+ books in my first year alone.
I started attending personal development conferences and seminars.
And met even more friends, more positive influences.
As my circle grew, so did the opportunities. High performance coaching. Business consulting.
Living life on my own terms.
It wasn't a straight ascent. But the altitude was increasing.
